items.title: Refreshed Profile
items.description: Profile and account surfaces now match the warmer Baskit visual system.

items.title: Smoother Progress
items.description: List progress bars now animate subtly as shopping items are completed.

items.title: Item Action Feedback
items.description: Adding, completing, and deleting items now provides light haptic feedback on supported devices.

items.title: Final UI Cleanup
items.description: The first Baskit UI revamp pass is complete across the primary list workflow and supporting account surfaces.
